data.title: Sungrow releases PowerTitan 3.0 for Europe's energy transition. Liquid-cooled system for utility-scale applications.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Madrid, Sungrow introduced PowerTitan 3.0, its latest liquid-cooled energy storage system designed for utility-scale use in Europe. The renowned PV inverter and energy storage system supplier aims to cater to the region's increasing energy transition efforts. The system is tailored for large-scale applications and marks a significant advancement in Sungrow’s offerings for the European market.
SAP SHARES FALL 11% AS CLOUD BACKLOG GROWTH DISAPPOINTS

data.title: Kyckr's report shows 68% of FCA UK AML fines tied to poor data quality, highlighting the importance of data accuracy.
data.description: In London, a recent report by Kyckr, a global company registry data provider, uncovered that 68% of Anti-Money Laundering fines imposed by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) in the UK were linked to data inadequacies. This highlights the significance of accurate and comprehensive data in regulatory compliance.

data.title: AI startup Meet-Ting, backed by Google, launches availability agent to prep calendars for AI scheduling.
data.description: A new availability agent has been introduced by Meet-Ting, which is an AI startup supported by Google. This new tool is designed to streamline calendar preparation in anticipation of the increasing reliance on AI scheduling and agents worldwide. Meet-Ting's innovative solution aims to enhance efficiency and organization in scheduling processes.

data.title: Dassault Systèmes announces 3DEXPERIENCE World in Houston from Feb 1-4, gathering thousands of users to explore AI in design and manufacturing.
data.description: VELIZY-VILLACOUBLAY, France--Dassault Systèmes revealed today that the upcoming 3DEXPERIENCE World event is set to be held in Houston from February 1st to 4th. This annual gathering will bring together numerous SOLIDWORKS and 3DEXPERIENCE platform users to delve into the advancements in design to manufacturing processes. The event will delve into the realms of 3D UNIV+RSES and artificial intelligence, focusing on their pivotal roles in fostering creativity and innovation. Notable speakers include Jensen Huang, the founder and CEO of NVIDIA, and Pablos Holman, a renowned hacker.

data.title: Roland and Musical Futures International launch the Roland ASPIRE Project to teach electronic music in classrooms, active in Bangkok, Melbourne, and Singapore.
data.description: Roland Corporation and Musical Futures International have collaborated to launch the Roland ASPIRE Project in Sydney. This initiative focuses on electronic music education and aims to facilitate hands-on music creation using user-friendly hardware in classroom environments. The program is tailored for educators from diverse musical backgrounds, emphasizing practical music-making rather than technical expertise. Currently operational in Bangkok, Melbourne, and Singapore, the project is designed to enhance music education experiences for students in these regions.

data.title: Meta plans to spend $115-$135 billion in 2026 on AI, aiming to support 'Meta Superintelligence Labs'. This amount can cover 90 NFL stadiums at $1.5 billion each and fund 10 James Webb Telescopes. Mark Zuckerberg bets big on 'superintelligence'.
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is increasing its focus on artificial intelligence (AI) with its largest capital expenditure plan yet for fiscal 2026. During the fourth-quarter earnings call, CFO Susan Li stated that the company is expecting capital expenditures for 2026 to range between $115 billion and $135 billion. A significant portion of this investment will support the efforts of Meta Superintelligence Labs. CEO Mark Zuckerberg emphasized the company's commitment to developing "personal superintelligence" by continuing to invest heavily in infrastructure for training advanced models. To provide context, $135 billion could cover the cost of building over 90 NFL stadiums at an average cost of $1.5 billion each. Additionally, this amount could fund the deployment of 10 more NASA James Webb Telescopes into space and is sufficient to operate an entire state.

data.title: New Earth Resources joins Critical Minerals Institute, a global organization focusing on critical minerals sector.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 29, 2026, New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) revealed its new affiliation with the Critical Minerals Institute (CMI), an international entity dedicated to enhancing understanding, partnership, and prospects within the critical minerals industry.

data.title: "Pride This Way" vodcast launched by Pillars of Change Media, offering immersive travel and culture experiences globally.
data.description: In the UK, Soraya, a Pride icon, is transforming perceptions of queer joy and resilience. Pillars of Change Media introduced the debut of Pride This Way, a travel and culture podcast, on January 29, 2026. The podcast aims to be an essential guide for global travelers seeking immersive experiences.

data.title: Orbia Building & Infrastructure (Wavin) and WERIT partner for sanitary pre-wall systems in Europe. Installation benefits for market growth.
data.description: In a joint announcement, Wavin, part of Orbia Advance Corporation, and WERIT Kunststoffwerke W. Schneider GmbH & Co. KG have revealed a collaborative venture in the European market for sanitary pre-wall installation systems. The partnership aims to enhance the range of building installation systems available to installers and homeowners. Leveraging Orbia Wavin’s established market position in piping and installation, the collaboration seeks to offer improved solutions to meet the demands of the European market.
HYUNDAI QUARTERLY PROFIT HALVES ON TARIFF HIT - WSJ

data.title: Munters Group AB reports exceptional demand with a 191% increase in Q4 order intake, but earnings weakened with a decrease in net sales by 8%. Adjusted EBITA margin declined due to lower volumes in AirTech and temporary tariff headwinds in DCT. Earnings per share at SEK -0.06 for Q4 and SEK 3.01 for full year 2025. Dividend proposed at 1.60 SEK per share. CEO optimistic for 2026 with high turnover expectation and improved profitability.
data.description: The divestment of the FoodTech Equipment offering has been completed. In the period of October to December, order intake saw a significant increase of 191%, driven by demand in Data Center Technologies (DCT), AirTech, and FoodTech. However, net sales declined by 8%, with growth in FoodTech, while AirTech declined. The adjusted EBITA margin also dropped due to temporary tariff challenges in DCT and lower volumes in AirTech. Cash flow from operating activities was strong, largely due to advances from customers in DCT. Leverage remained stable at 2.9x, with earnings per share amounting to SEK -0.06 in this period. For January to December, order intake increased by 85%, driven by DCT and FoodTech growth. Net sales saw an 8% increase, mainly through DCT and FoodTech, despite AirTech decline. The adjusted EBITA margin decreased due to various factors. Cash flow from operating activities dropped, partly from lower earnings. Leverage increased during the year. Earnings per share were SEK 3.01 for the year. The Board of Directors proposed a dividend of 1.60 SEK per share totaling MSEK 292. The CEO mentioned exceptional order intake growth in Q4, primarily in DCT. Profitability was below ambitions due to temporary factors. Expectations are high for 2026. The DCT segment saw record orders with impacts on the EBITA margin due to tariffs and product mix. Anticipated growth and improvements are expected in 2026.

data.title: Kandi Technologies partners with Qiji Energy to advance heavy-truck battery swapping, boosting infrastructure deployment.
data.description: Improving the infrastructure for battery swap services is crucial to fast-track the widespread adoption of heavy-truck battery swapping. This involves strategically deploying charging stations across key locations to support the seamless exchange of batteries. This initiative aims to significantly boost the implementation of heavy-truck battery swapping on a larger scale.

data.title: Temenos honors partners including IBM, Accenture, Capgemini for excellence at their annual awards.
data.description: Three major companies, IBM, Accenture, and Capgemini, have recently been acknowledged for their dedication to excellence. This recognition highlights their exceptional performance and commitment to providing high-quality services in the business industry. These companies have shown outstanding dedication in their respective fields, with IBM leading in technological innovation, Accenture excelling in consulting services, and Capgemini standing out in management consulting. This recognition underscores their position as key players in the industry, with IBM having a market capitalization of $123 billion, Accenture at $168 billion, and Capgemini at $24 billion. Their continued focus on excellence is evident in their financial success and continued growth.

data.title: Alvotech settles patent disputes with Regeneron and Bayer globally for its biosimilar to Eylea® 2mg, securing global marketing rights for the medicine.
data.description: In Reykjavik, Iceland on January 29, 2026, Alvotech, a biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ under ALVO, shared that it has successfully concluded a licensing and settlement deal with Regeneron and Bayer. This agreement resolves all existing patent disputes internationally regarding Alvotech’s biosimilar to Eylea® 2mg (aflibercept 40 mg/mL solution). The biosimilar is already approved for sale in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, and Japan. Combining this recent agreement with a previous one that set a license entry date for the U.S. in Q4 of 2026, contingent on regulatory approval, Alvotech now possesses the rights globally to produce and distribute its aflibercept biosimilar to its commercial partners.
Sampo Group will release its 2025 results on February 5, 2026.

data.title: 21shares introduces Jito Staked SOL ETP (JSOL) for Solana yield exposure, merging staking yield with price, enhancing access.
data.description: The recently launched Exchange-Traded Product (ETP) offers investors the opportunity to easily invest in JitoSOL, providing them with exposure to the complete price movements of Solana. Additionally, investors can benefit from a dual-source staking yield.
